module.name: Counter BioChem
module.description: Defense, healing, detection, prevention, and recovery from biological and chemical threats deployed by hostile entities.

counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.name: Biochem Defense Protocols
counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.description: Training in protective measures, decontamination procedures, and shielding techniques against biological and chemical threats.

counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.name: BioChem Survival Medicine
counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.description: Training in emergency medical treatment, holistic healing, and unconventional yet effective countermeasures against BioChem threats.

counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.name: Contagion Containment Strategies
counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.description: Training in rapid response, quarantine protocols, and mitigation techniques to prevent the spread of bioweapons and naturally occurring pandemics.

counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.name: Food & Water Supply Protection
counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.description: Training in detecting and preventing food and water supply tampering to mitigate slow poisoning, malnutrition, and sabotage efforts.

counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.name: Medical PsyOps Resistance
counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.description: Training in countering medical disinformation, identifying false medical authorities, and ensuring correct treatment strategies against TCS/IDC/CBC medical warfare.

counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.name: Toxin Neutralization Tactics
counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.description: Training in the identification, counteraction, and detoxification of poisons, venom, synthetic biochem threats, and mutagenic agents.

counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.name: Airborne Pathogen Defense
counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.description: Techniques and strategies to prevent, detect, and neutralize airborne biological threats.

cards.title: Respiratory Protection Against Airborne Threats
cards.description: Understanding and using proper respirators and filtration systems to prevent inhalation exposure.
cards.bulletpoints: N95 vs. P100, full-face respirators, SCBA systems
cards.summaryText: Match respirators to threat levels, test seals, and rotate filters so you never breathe unfiltered aerosols in contaminated zones.

cards.title: Air Filtration and Containment Strategies
cards.description: Utilizing air purification and containment methods to prevent pathogen spread.
cards.bulletpoints: HEPA filtration, UV light sterilization, airlock procedures
cards.summaryText: Layer HEPA stacks, UV kill zones, and tight airlock discipline to choke airborne pathogens before they migrate between spaces.

cards.title: Rapid Biohazard Detection & Analysis
cards.description: Techniques for identifying airborne biological threats in real time.
cards.bulletpoints: Portable air samplers, biotoxin detection strips, environmental monitoring
cards.summaryText: Deploy samplers, strips, and real-time monitors to flag pathogen spikes fast enough to trigger containment protocols.

counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.name: Chemical Shielding Tactics
counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.description: Defensive measures to protect against chemical exposure, toxic gas attacks, and corrosive agents.

cards.title: Chemical Barrier Protection Techniques
cards.description: Strategies for shielding against hazardous chemical exposure using specialized materials.
cards.bulletpoints: Activated carbon filters, chemical-resistant suits, barrier creams
cards.summaryText: Layer carbon filtration, sealed suits, and barrier creams so corrosive agents never reach your skin or airway.

cards.title: Neutralization of Toxic Chemical Agents
cards.description: Using counteragents and neutralizers to mitigate the effects of chemical exposure.
cards.bulletpoints: Oxidizing agents, pH neutralization, decontamination foams
cards.summaryText: Deploy oxidizers, pH buffers, and decon foams in the right order so toxins break down before they harm personnel.

cards.title: Emergency Evacuation & Containment Strategies
cards.description: Rapid response planning for chemical spills, gas leaks, and mass contamination events.
cards.bulletpoints: Containment zone setup, gas dispersal tactics, emergency egress planning
cards.summaryText: Stand up containment perimeters, vent or scrub the air, and execute rehearsed evac routes to keep hot zones from cascading.

counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.name: Hazmat Safety Training
counter_biochem_biochem_defense_protocol.description: Mastering the use of hazardous materials (HazMat) protective gear, contamination control, and exposure response.

cards.title: Proper Use of PPE in BioChem Environments
cards.description: Training in the correct donning, doffing, and maintenance of protective gear in hazardous environments.
cards.bulletpoints: Hazmat suit layers, glove sealing, respirator fitting
cards.summaryText: Drill clean donning and doffing sequences, seal gloves and respirators, and inspect gear so breaches never happen inside the hot zone.

cards.title: Decontamination Protocols for BioChem Exposure
cards.description: Step-by-step procedures to remove and neutralize biohazards from personnel and equipment.
cards.bulletpoints: Chemical neutralization, UV sterilization, containment zone decon
cards.summaryText: Move through decon corridors with neutralizers, UV, and rinse cycles so contaminants are stripped before anyone re-enters cold zones.

cards.title: Emergency Response to BioChem Exposure
cards.description: Rapid response strategies for treating exposure to biological and chemical agents.
cards.bulletpoints: Neutralization agents, emergency isolation, first aid for chemical burns
cards.summaryText: Deploy neutralizers, isolate casualties, and stabilize injuries on the spot to stop BioChem exposures from escalating.

counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.name: Emergency First Aid for BioChem Exposure
counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.description: Training in rapid response treatment for biological and chemical exposure in high-risk environments.

cards.title: Neutralizing Chemical Burns & Skin Exposure
cards.description: Methods for treating chemical burns, skin contact poisoning, and dermal exposure to hazardous substances.
cards.bulletpoints: Irrigation techniques, pH neutralization, barrier application
cards.summaryText: Flush and strip contaminants fast, neutralize pH swings, and reseal skin so chemical burns stop progressing.

cards.title: Emergency Airway Management in BioChem Exposure
cards.description: Procedures for clearing airways and providing oxygen support after inhalation of toxic gases or airborne bioweapons.
cards.bulletpoints: Oxygen therapy, airway clearance, assisted ventilation
cards.summaryText: Clear airways, flood lungs with clean oxygen, and assist ventilation before toxins shut down respiration.

cards.title: Antidote Administration & Rapid Detox
cards.description: Using emergency antidotes and detox agents to counteract poisons, venoms, and neurotoxins.
cards.bulletpoints: Epinephrine injections, activated charcoal, chelation therapy
cards.summaryText: Deploy the right antidote or detox protocol on contact so toxins are bound, neutralized, or flushed before systemic damage.

counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.name: Holistic & Herbal Remedies
counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.description: Utilizing herbal medicine, traditional healing methods, and alternative therapies for BioChem recovery.

cards.title: Herbal Detoxification & Antidotes
cards.description: Using medicinal plants and natural compounds to neutralize toxins and support recovery.
cards.bulletpoints: Activated charcoal, milk thistle, turmeric for liver detox
cards.summaryText: Pair detox herbs with chelation protocols so the body can flush residual toxins without overloading the liver.

cards.title: Regenerative Medicine & Tissue Recovery
cards.description: Natural methods to accelerate healing, reduce inflammation, and repair damaged tissues.
cards.bulletpoints: Collagen regeneration, essential oils, cellular rejuvenation
cards.summaryText: Stack regenerative nutrients and anti-inflammatory botanicals to rebuild tissue and calm trauma responses.

cards.title: Immune System Fortification
cards.description: Strengthening the body’s natural defenses against biological threats and environmental toxins.
cards.bulletpoints: Adaptogens, immune boosters, nutritional therapy
cards.summaryText: Cycle adaptogens, micronutrients, and hydration so immunity stays primed when BioChem stress hits.

counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.name: Survival Treatment in Hostile Environments
counter_biochem_biochem_survival_medicin.description: Emergency medical and survival treatment strategies for exposure to biological, chemical, and environmental hazards in high-risk areas.

cards.title: Field-Ready Antidotes & Improvised Treatments
cards.description: Using natural, locally available resources to neutralize poisons, toxins, and chemical contaminants when standard medical supplies are unavailable.
bulletpoints: Activated charcoal for absorbing ingested poisons and neutralizing toxins.
Apple cider vinegar and baking soda mixture for counteracting mild chemical burns.
Crushed plantain leaves as an emergency wound dressing with antimicrobial properties.
Honey as an antiseptic and wound barrier to prevent infection.
cards.summaryText: Improvise detox tools from charcoal, vinegar mixes, plantain, and honey so poisons and wounds are stabilized even off-grid.

cards.title: Wound Care & Infection Control Without Modern Supplies
cards.description: Preventing infections and promoting healing using natural antimicrobial and wound management techniques.
bulletpoints: Honey dressings to prevent bacterial infections and speed up healing.
Clay poultices (e.g., bentonite clay) to draw out toxins and reduce inflammation.
Cauterization with heated metal or fire sterilization for deep cuts when no sutures are available.
Saltwater (saline) irrigation for cleaning wounds and preventing bacterial growth.
cards.summaryText: Hold infection at bay with natural dressings, clay draws, emergency cautery, and saline flushes when sterile kits are gone.

cards.title: Treating Radiation & Heavy Metal Poisoning in Crisis
cards.description: Emergency detox protocols for radioactive exposure and heavy metal contamination.
bulletpoints: Potassium iodide (KI) to block radioactive iodine absorption in the thyroid.
Zeolite clay and activated charcoal to bind heavy metals and remove toxins from the body.
Chlorella and spirulina for detoxifying radiation and repairing cellular damage.
Vitamin C megadosing to neutralize free radicals caused by radiation exposure.
cards.summaryText: Stack KI, binding clays, algae, and C megadoses to block uptake, chelate metals, and rebuild cells after radiation hits.

cards.title: Respiratory Protection & Emergency Air Filtration
cards.description: Techniques for preventing inhalation of airborne biological, chemical, and radioactive particulates.
bulletpoints: Improvised gas masks using activated charcoal and cloth filters.
Creating a basic air filtration system using damp fabric to trap airborne particles.
Building a sealed room using plastic sheeting and duct tape to block airborne threats.
Breathing techniques for minimizing lung exposure in high-risk environments.
cards.summaryText: Rig improvised masks, damp filters, and sealed rooms so your lungs stay clear even when air turns hostile.

cards.title: Water Purification & Anti-Contamination Strategies
cards.description: Ensuring safe drinking water by neutralizing biological, chemical, and radioactive contaminants.
bulletpoints: Boiling water for at least 10 minutes to kill bacteria, viruses, and parasites.
Using activated charcoal to remove chemical contaminants and improve water taste.
Solar distillation (solar still) to remove heavy metals and desalinate seawater.
Iodine and chlorine dioxide tablets to purify water in emergency situations.
cards.summaryText: Cycle boiling, charcoal, solar distillation, and chemical tabs so every sip stays safe from BioChem contamination.

cards.title: Emergency Biological Threat Isolation & Quarantine
cards.description: Strategies for preventing pathogen spread in a crisis where infectious diseases or bioweapons are involved.
bulletpoints: Creating an improvised quarantine zone using plastic barriers and sealed rooms.
Using UV-C light for sterilizing small items and surfaces.
DIY (Do-It-Yourself) personal protective equipment (PPE) such as gloves, masks, and face shields.
Natural air filtration using plants that absorb toxins and release oxygen.
cards.summaryText: Stand up quarantine bubbles, run UV sterilization, and improvise PPE so outbreaks die before they spread.

cards.title: Emergency Herbal Medicine for BioChem Threats
cards.description: Using plant-based medicine to counteract chemical and biological warfare threats.
bulletpoints: Garlic and oregano oil as natural antibiotics for bacterial infections.
Turmeric and black pepper for reducing inflammation and toxin buildup.
Dandelion and milk thistle to support liver detoxification from chemical exposure.
Elderberry and echinacea to strengthen the immune system against viral threats.
cards.summaryText: Deploy potent botanicals to fight infection, cut inflammation, and keep detox pathways clearing BioChem insults.

cards.title: Combatting Nerve Agent & Neurotoxin Exposure
cards.description: Methods for neutralizing exposure to nerve agents and neurotoxic chemicals.
bulletpoints: Atropine as an emergency antidote for organophosphate nerve agents.
Sodium bicarbonate (baking soda) to help alkalize the body and reduce toxicity.
Magnesium sulfate (Epsom salts) for nervous system support after neurotoxin exposure.
Breathing exercises to maintain oxygen flow and counteract paralysis effects.
cards.summaryText: Rotate atropine, alkalizers, magnesium support, and controlled breathing to blunt nerve agent effects until evac.

cards.title: Decontaminating Clothing & Skin After Exposure
cards.description: Emergency decontamination protocols to remove chemical and biological agents from the body and clothing.
bulletpoints: Removing and safely disposing of contaminated clothing to prevent re-exposure.
Using a clay or activated charcoal scrub to absorb chemical toxins from skin.
Taking a cold shower with mild soap to minimize skin absorption of hazardous substances.
Rinsing eyes with saline or clean water for exposure to chemical irritants.
cards.summaryText: Strip contaminated layers, scrub with absorptive media, and rinse skin or eyes fast to halt secondary exposure.

counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.name: Emergency Containment Protocols
counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.description: Training in rapid containment strategies for biological outbreaks and bioweapon releases.

cards.title: Rapid Response to Biohazard Incidents
cards.description: Emergency procedures for handling sudden pathogen outbreaks or bioweapon releases.
cards.bulletpoints: First responder coordination, decontamination drills, isolation protocols
cards.summaryText: Spool emergency teams, lock down perimeters, and launch decon drills so outbreaks get boxed in before they spread.

cards.title: Deployment of Mobile Containment Units
cards.description: Setting up field containment zones and temporary biohazard response stations.
cards.bulletpoints: Mobile quarantine tents, rapid diagnostic stations, emergency airlocks
cards.summaryText: Roll out mobile tents, diagnostics, and airlocks to stand up containment hubs wherever the hot zone pops.

cards.title: Counteracting Bioweapon Dispersal Methods
cards.description: Identifying and neutralizing different delivery methods used in bioterrorism.
cards.bulletpoints: Aerosolized dispersal, water supply contamination, foodborne pathogen mitigation
cards.summaryText: Trace aerosol, water, or food vectors fast and deploy neutralizers so the delivery chain collapses.

counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.name: Infection Control Tactics
counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.description: Mastering strategies to prevent and control the spread of infectious diseases and biological threats.

cards.title: Proper Use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
cards.description: Ensuring effective protection against biological hazards through correct use of PPE.
cards.bulletpoints: Glove layering, N95 vs. P100 masks, full-body suit protocols
cards.summaryText: Layer gloves, seal suits, and match respirators to the threat so no pathogen slips past your PPE.

cards.title: Sterilization & Disinfection Techniques
cards.description: Methods for eliminating pathogens from surfaces, equipment, and environments.
cards.bulletpoints: UV sterilization, chemical disinfectants, autoclave usage
cards.summaryText: Cycle UV, chemical, and thermal sterilization so every surface and tool stays pathogen-free.

cards.title: Barrier and Isolation Measures
cards.description: Strategies for minimizing direct and indirect pathogen transmission.
cards.bulletpoints: Negative pressure rooms, contact isolation, airlock procedures
cards.summaryText: Lock down zones with negative pressure, contact barriers, and tight airlock discipline to shut down transmission routes.

counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.name: Quarantine Zone Management
counter_biochem_contagion_containment_st.description: Training in establishing and enforcing effective quarantine zones to limit pathogen spread.

cards.title: Establishing a Secure Quarantine Zone
cards.description: Techniques for setting up controlled containment areas to restrict pathogen spread.
cards.bulletpoints: Zoning protocols, air filtration, entry/exit decontamination
cards.summaryText: Lock down zones with layered barriers, filtered airflow, and strict decon so nothing leaks out.

cards.title: Psychological and Social Management in Quarantine
cards.description: Handling panic, misinformation, and public compliance during quarantine operations.
cards.bulletpoints: Crisis communication, misinformation countermeasures, morale maintenance
cards.summaryText: Stabilize morale, counter rumors, and keep communication clear so quarantined populations stay cooperative.

cards.title: Medical Triage & Resource Allocation in Quarantine Zones
cards.description: Effective triage and resource distribution strategies for high-risk containment areas.
cards.bulletpoints: Priority care levels, medical supply rationing, decision-making under crisis
cards.summaryText: Run crisis triage, ration supplies, and make fast calls so limited resources save the most lives inside quarantine.

counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.name: Detecting Tainted Food Sources
counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.description: Techniques to identify and prevent contamination, poisoning, and nutritional sabotage in food supplies.

cards.title: Identifying Spoiled & Contaminated Foods
cards.description: Recognizing signs of microbial growth, chemical alterations, and toxin presence in food.
cards.bulletpoints: Visual cues, chemical testing, microbial culture methods
cards.summaryText: Scan food for off colors, odors, or textures, back it up with quick chemical strips, and culture suspicious samples before they hit plates.

cards.title: Foodborne Pathogen Detection
cards.description: Testing and identifying bacterial, viral, and fungal contaminants in food sources.
cards.bulletpoints: Listeria, Salmonella, E. coli, mycotoxins detection methods
cards.summaryText: Deploy rapid assays for Listeria, Salmonella, E. coli, and mold toxins so outbreaks get crushed before distribution.

cards.title: Detecting Slow Poisoning & Bio-Accumulation
cards.description: Recognizing symptoms and patterns of slow-acting poisons in food over time.
cards.bulletpoints: Heavy metal testing, synthetic toxin markers, long-term exposure symptoms
cards.summaryText: Track heavy metals and synthetic toxins in tissues and watch for creeping symptoms to expose slow-burn poisoning.

counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.name: Supply Chain Protection Tactics
counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.description: Strategies to prevent food and water supply tampering and ensure security in distribution networks.

cards.title: Monitoring for Supply Chain Tampering
cards.description: Detecting disruptions and intentional contamination in food and water distribution systems.
cards.bulletpoints: Inspection checkpoints, tracking supply anomalies, packaging integrity checks
cards.summaryText: Instrument every node with inspections and anomaly tracking so tampering gets caught before cargo moves.

cards.title: Defensive Measures Against Food & Water Sabotage
cards.description: Developing safeguards to prevent malicious alterations in critical supply networks.
cards.bulletpoints: Supply chain fortification, storage security, protective barriers
cards.summaryText: Harden warehouses, lock storage, and build barriers so saboteurs never reach core reserves.

cards.title: Covert and Overt Protection Strategies for Food & Water Reserves
cards.description: Using both visible and hidden security measures to protect against large-scale contamination attempts.
cards.bulletpoints: Surveillance methods, tamper-proof seals, strategic stockpiling
cards.summaryText: Blend obvious security with covert surveillance and tamper seals to deter attacks and catch the ones that try.

counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.name: Water Supply Purification Methods
counter_biochem_food_water_supply_protec.description: Ensuring safe and clean water by detecting contaminants and using effective purification techniques.

cards.title: Testing for Chemical Contaminants in Water
cards.description: Methods to detect heavy metals, pesticides, and industrial pollutants in water.
cards.bulletpoints: pH testing, heavy metal detection, pesticide residue analysis
cards.summaryText: Run pH and heavy metal panels plus pesticide assays so you know exactly what contaminants you’re fighting.

cards.title: Emergency Water Purification Techniques
cards.description: Practical methods to purify water in survival situations or after suspected contamination.
cards.bulletpoints: Boiling, chemical treatment, solar disinfection, filtration
cards.summaryText: Cycle boiling, chemical drops, solar UV, and filtration to strip out pathogens and toxins fast.

cards.title: Waterborne Disease Prevention & Response
cards.description: Protecting against infections caused by contaminated water sources.
cards.bulletpoints: Cholera, Giardia, Cryptosporidium prevention strategies
cards.summaryText: Fortify hygiene, vaccinate when possible, and deploy rehydration and antibiotics to stay ahead of waterborne outbreaks.

counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.name: Combatting PsyOps in Healthcare
counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.description: Counteracting psychological warfare used to manipulate medical decisions, suppress real cures, and enforce harmful treatments.

cards.title: Exposing the Illusion of Scientific Consensus
cards.description: Identifying how the perception of scientific agreement is artificially engineered.
cards.bulletpoints: Controlled expert panels, selective peer review, silencing of dissenting voices
cards.summaryText: Interrogate claimed consensus, trace who curates panels, and surface silenced voices so manufactured agreement collapses.

cards.title: Coercion Tactics in Public Health Policies
cards.description: Understanding how fear and social pressure are used to enforce medical compliance.
cards.bulletpoints: Mandates vs. informed consent, social ostracization, crisis exploitation
cards.summaryText: Map fear narratives, mandate pressure, and social shaming so you can defend informed consent.

cards.title: Breaking the Cycle of Institutional Trust Abuse
cards.description: Revealing how global institutions are weaponized to maintain medical control structures.
cards.bulletpoints: NGOs & foundations as soft power tools, regulatory capture, historical case studies
cards.summaryText: Trace funding loops, document capture, and expose repeated abuses to rebuild trust on verified ground.

counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.name: Detecting Medical Disinformation
counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.description: Training in recognizing false and misleading medical information used as a tool for control, suppression, and deception.

cards.title: Spotting False Medical Narratives in Mainstream Media
cards.description: Analyzing corporate-controlled media tactics used to promote misleading medical information.
cards.bulletpoints: Scripted messaging, narrative reinforcement, suppression of alternative medicine
cards.summaryText: Audit headlines, script leaks, and missing voices so coordinated false narratives stand out.

cards.title: Understanding Pharma-Backed Disinformation Campaigns
cards.description: Unmasking the role of pharmaceutical conglomerates in controlling medical discourse.
cards.bulletpoints: Industry-funded studies, ghostwritten medical journals, suppression of generic treatments
cards.summaryText: Trace funding trails, ghostwriting fingerprints, and generic suppression to expose pharma-led spin.

cards.title: Social Engineering Tactics in Medical Propaganda
cards.description: Examining how psychological warfare is used to manipulate medical choices on a global scale.
cards.bulletpoints: Fear-based compliance, problem-reaction-solution cycles, false scarcity tactics
cards.summaryText: Map fear triggers, staged crises, and scarcity plays so you can dismantle social engineering in medicine.

counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.name: Verifying Legitimate Treatments
counter_biochem_medical_psyops_resistanc.description: Training in identifying authentic medical treatments while filtering out suppressed cures and controlled industry deception.

cards.title: How to Research Medical Treatments Independently
cards.description: Techniques for conducting unbiased investigations into treatment options.
cards.bulletpoints: Analyzing study methodologies, funding source tracking, cross-referencing global research
cards.summaryText: Dissect study design, follow funding trails, and compare international data so your conclusions rest on primary evidence.

cards.title: Suppressed Treatments and Alternative Medicine
cards.description: Investigating natural remedies and suppressed medical solutions.
cards.bulletpoints: Herbal antivirals, non-toxic cancer treatments, historical suppression of cures
cards.summaryText: Catalog alternative protocols, weigh toxicity claims, and verify documented suppression before adopting any remedy.

cards.title: Recognizing Weaponized Medicine & Controlled Harm
cards.description: Distinguishing between genuine healthcare and industry-driven harm.
cards.bulletpoints: Long-term side effect monitoring, depopulation agendas, unethical human trials
cards.summaryText: Track safety signals over time, document unethical practices, and surface patterns that separate malpractice from evidence-based care.

counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.name: Antidote & Detox Methods
counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.description: Training in counteracting poisons, venom, and synthetic biochem threats through antidotes, natural detox, and biochemical repair.

cards.title: Emergency Antidotes for Common Industrial Poisons
cards.description: Using pharmaceutical and holistic antidotes for known toxins used in industrial and biochem warfare.
cards.bulletpoints: Activated charcoal, NAC, sodium thiosulfate, chelation therapy
cards.summaryText: Deploy charcoal, NAC, thiosulfate, and chelators immediately to bind and expel industrial toxins before systemic damage spreads.

cards.title: Natural Detoxification Against Heavy Metals & Neurotoxins
cards.description: Using herbal and natural methods to expel heavy metals and neurological toxins from the body.
cards.bulletpoints: Zeolite, chlorella, spirulina, cilantro detox protocols
cards.summaryText: Cycle zeolite, chlorella, spirulina, and cilantro to chelate heavy metals and clear neurotoxins naturally over sustained detox phases.

cards.title: Reversing DNA & Organ Damage from Mutagenic Agents
cards.description: Strategies for reversing the effects of genetic-modifying bioweapons and organ-damaging toxins.
cards.bulletpoints: Molecular hydrogen therapy, fasting-induced autophagy, mitochondrial repair compounds
cards.summaryText: Use molecular hydrogen, fasting autophagy, and mitochondrial compounds to trigger cellular repair and reverse mutagenic damage.

counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.name: BioChem Emergency Treatment
counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.description: Training in immediate response tactics for exposure to weaponized biological and chemical agents.

cards.title: Field Treatment for Chemical & Bioweapon Exposure
cards.description: Emergency response techniques for rapid decontamination and counteraction of biochem threats.
cards.bulletpoints: Skin decontamination, gas mask usage, rapid chelation protocols
cards.summaryText: Strip contaminated gear, decontaminate skin, don gas mask, and administer rapid chelation to halt biochem agent absorption.

cards.title: Neutralizing Food & Water Poisoning in Crisis Situations
cards.description: Immediate countermeasures for ingesting contaminated food and water in survival scenarios.
cards.bulletpoints: Emergency purging, gastrointestinal binding agents, rapid hydration techniques
cards.summaryText: Induce purging, administer binding agents to trap toxins in the gut, and rehydrate aggressively to prevent systemic poisoning.

cards.title: Surviving Long-Term Exposure to Environmental Biochem Warfare
cards.description: Techniques for mitigating damage from slow-acting bio-accumulative toxins.
cards.bulletpoints: Hormonal repair, immune system restoration, cellular regeneration protocols
cards.summaryText: Rebalance hormones, restore immune function, and activate cellular regeneration to counter chronic bio-accumulative toxin damage.

counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.name: Toxin Detection & Testing
counter_biochem_toxin_neutralization_tac.description: Training in identifying and testing for synthetic poisons, venom, and industrial biotoxins used in covert chemical warfare.

cards.title: Identifying Synthetic Poisons in Consumer Products
cards.description: Recognizing hidden toxins in food, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and household items.
cards.bulletpoints: Heavy metals, endocrine disruptors, neurotoxic additives
cards.summaryText: Scan labels, test batches for heavy metals and endocrine disruptors, and avoid neurotoxic additives hidden in consumer goods.

cards.title: Water & Airborne Toxin Testing Methods
cards.description: Techniques for detecting chemical and biological contaminants in drinking water and air.
cards.bulletpoints: pH imbalance, volatile organic compounds, aerosolized neurotoxins
cards.summaryText: Test pH, measure VOCs, and detect aerosolized neurotoxins to confirm water and air safety before consumption or prolonged exposure.

cards.title: Covert Poisoning Indicators & Early Warning Signs
cards.description: Recognizing subtle poisoning attempts through gradual exposure methods.
cards.bulletpoints: Fatigue patterns, cognitive decline, immune suppression effects
cards.summaryText: Monitor fatigue trends, cognitive dips, and immune suppression markers to catch covert poisoning before irreversible damage occurs.
